consistency.level_association: Consistent. Listed as a Level 1 feature.
consistency.mechanic_alignment: Mechanics align with expected Warlock Pact features: granting access to unique spells/cantrips and a specific magical item (Book of Shadows).

quality.clarity: High clarity. The core mechanics (choosing 3 cantrips from any list, casting at will, not counting against known spells) are well-defined.
quality.completeness: Complete. It covers acquisition, usage, spell list integration ('warlock spells for you'), and replacement/destruction procedures for the Book of Shadows.

mechanics.core_benefit: Access to three additional cantrips from any class list, castable at will while the Book of Shadows is held.
mechanics.scaling_or_limitations: Cantrips do not count against the Warlock's known cantrips limit, which is a significant benefit.
mechanics.spell_integration: The chosen cantrips become Warlock spells for the purpose of this feature, implying they utilize Warlock spell slots/casting modifiers, although this is implicitly understood rather than explicitly stated (standard for this feature).
mechanics.item_dependency: Strong dependency on the 'Book of Shadows'. Replacement ritual is clearly defined (1 hour ceremony during rest).

suggested_updates: Explicitly state that the chosen cantrips use the Warlock's spellcasting ability modifier when cast, as this is the standard interpretation but aids absolute clarity.
Ensure the cross-reference link for '[warlock spell list]' is functional or noted as a placeholder if this is being ingested into a system that resolves internal links.
